steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The historians' dismissal as a hoax shows they rejected the letters' authenticity. For this rejection to be justified, the blank must mean confirming or proving something is genuine.

steps.title: Match the word to the meaning
steps.content: ”Validate” means to confirm or verify as authentic. If historians couldn't validate the letters' authenticity, dismissing them as a hoax is the logical outcome. Interpret, relate, and accommodate don't express confirming authenticity. That matches choice A — A is correct.
